## Meeting Purpose

[Explore AI-powered SEO and content creation services offered by Marcel Santilli's company for Coast's marketing needs.](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company offers AI-driven content creation workflows, producing 100,000+ words/month with human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Services include content strategy, creation, adaptation, and full-service management (including CMS staging)](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Pricing starts at $9,000/month per workstream, with a 3-month minimum commitment](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [Coast sees potential value but notes it's at the higher end of their budget](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Background and Company Overview

  - [Former CMO at DeepGram, SkillAI, Service Titan, and HashiCorp](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [New company (unnamed) crossed $2M ARR in 4 months](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Clients include Reddit, Ramp, Homebase, and others](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Offers AI-powered content creation with human strategists and editors](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Uses AI workflows for research, planning, and initial drafting](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Includes steps for brand adaptation and human editing](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Produces 100,000+ words/month at \~$0.10/word](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Aims for high-quality, unique content that adds value](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)

### SEO Strategy and Results

  - [Focus on creating a "halo effect" around the brand](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Targets various stages of customer journey, not just direct product searches](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [Example: HVAC load calculator for Service Titan became top lead generator](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [Phased approach: establish production, enrich content, focus on conversion, then monetization](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Coast's Current SEO Situation

  - [Invested in content library creation since 2022](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
  - [Seeing results in competitive "fuel card" category](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [Successfully boosted domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [Ranking well for key terms like "best fuel card"](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [Looking to focus more on conversion and industry-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)

### Service Offering and Pricing

  - [Workstream model: $9,000/month for up to 100,000 words](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [Includes net new content and content refreshing](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Full-service approach with dedicated strategist and managing editor](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [Minimum 3-month commitment](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [Typically publishing content by week 2 of engagement](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)

### Additional Services

  - [Offers "last mile" services: artwork generation, CMS staging, fact-checking, plagiarism checking](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [Provides Slack channel for client communication and transparency](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [Notion workspace for documentation and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send follow-up email with:](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
      - [Meeting replay](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
      - [Notion workspace access](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
      - [Potential onboarding dates (end of October onwards)](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
      - [Additional service details](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
  - [Coast to review materials and consider budget alignment](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)
  - [Potential scheduling of further discussions or demos if interested](https://fathom.video/share/1jFi9AMHhuy1syKqk_XKsHHqEt5qc6HD?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)
